fixes.title: Move the lambda body to a top-level function that takes 'threshold' as an explicit parameter, and call that function from the lambda
Capture 'threshold' before the call site and pass it as the receiver / fold seed (e.g. 'items.fold(threshold, (acc, p) => ...)')
Known v0.4 limitation: per-element predicates that depend on outer locals must be refactored away from lambdas

message: lambda cannot reference 'threshold' from the enclosing function; lambdas may only use their own parameters and top-level functions
